objective: In glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py, in the create_task tool handler inside write_tasks(), add a generated_at field to task_data with the current UTC timestamp in ISO format. Import datetime at the top of the file if not already imported. The field should be added after the source field in task_data. Only touch glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py. Verify: python -m ruff check glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q
commit_message: feat(auditor): add generated_at timestamp to created tasks
implementation_summary: Updated glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py only: imported datetime/timezone and added a generated_at field with the current UTC ISO timestamp to task_data in the create_task handler, immediately after source. Ruff check passed for the file. Full pytest run hit an existing unrelated failure in tests/agents/test_implementer_run_check_success_message.py caused by glitchlab/agents/implementer.py, which was out of scope and left untouched.

data.description: Ensures TaskWriter writes a generated_at UTC ISO timestamp into created task YAML files when handling the create_task tool.
